queue.tweet: Tottenham is on their third manager of the season and at this point they're just collecting them like baseball cards. They really think Roberto de Zerbi is the missing puzzle piece. Meanwhile my local Sunday league team is still looking for a goalie.
queue.original_title: Seven games to save Tottenham's season - but why De Zerbi?

queue.tweet: Gao Zhen is on trial in China for making art that mocks Mao, which is a wild way to spend a family vacation. We're living in a world where a sculpture is enough to trigger a national security crisis. They arrested the critic before the art could even finish speaking.
queue.original_title: US-based dissident artist put on trial in China over satirical Mao sculptures, says rights group

queue.tweet: I finally found out why hotel carpets look like a fever dream from the 90s. They're designed specifically to hide stains and manage foot traffic patterns so the staff doesn't lose their minds. Respect the commitment.
queue.original_title: Why Are Hotel Carpets So Busy and Patterned?

queue.tweet: Tiger Woods admitted he was looking at his phone and messing with the radio right before his crash. We've all been there, just usually at 5mph in a parking lot instead of a highway. I just wanted to be normal about it.
queue.original_title: Tiger said he was looking at phone before crash

queue.tweet: Tottenham fans are threatening to boycott matches if the club hires Roberto de Zerbi. It's honestly impressive how much stress a game can cause people who aren't even on the field. Nobody asked.
queue.original_title: Tottenham Supporters' Trust says it cannot support De Zerbi appointment

queue.tweet: Pakistan and China just dropped a 5-part peace plan for the Middle East while everyone else is still picking sides. Who exactly is this helping.
queue.original_title: Pakistan and China propose five-part peace plan for Middle East
